title: coap_keys.c: base64_encode returns 0 prematurely due to off-by-one
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Line: 206-207

The base64_encode function has an off-by-one error in its buffer space check:
```c
if (out_idx + 4 >= out_len) {
    return 0;
}
```

This returns failure when there is exactly enough space for 4 characters. Should be:
```c
if (out_idx + 4 > out_len) {
```

Impact: Base64 encoding fails prematurely when output buffer size is an exact multiple of 4 plus 1 for NUL terminator.

Category: CORRECTNESS - off-by-one error
